pr.title: chore: bump gh-aw-firewall to v0.25.53
pr.body:
Upgrades the default AWF binary from `v0.25.52` → `v0.25.53`.

## Changes

- **`pkg/constants/version_constants.go`** — bump `DefaultFirewallVersion` to `v0.25.53`; no `AWF*MinVersion` changes needed (no new gated flags in this release)
- **Lock files** — all 234 `.lock.yml` files regenerated via `make build && make recompile && make recompile`
- **Golden tests** — updated to reflect new version strings in AWF config and image download steps
- **Changeset** — patch entry added

## Release highlights (v0.25.52 → v0.25.53)

- Fix: Anthropic requests retried after deprecated `anthropic-beta` header rejection
- Fix: claude-token-optimizer resolves workflow via `.lock.yml` when `.md` lacks a `name` field
- Internal refactors of agent env, volume, and Squid config assembly into focused modules
- Docs: model fallback feature documented

Schema (`docs/awf-config.schema.json`) is unchanged between releases — no embedded schema update needed.
pr.author: Copilot
